Publications

My publications, latest update: 02/02/2023

2023

  1. TreEnhance
    TreEnhance: A tree search method for low-light image enhancement
    Marco Cotogni, and Claudio Cusano
    Pattern Recognition, 2023
    arXiv Official Website

2022

  1. GCAB
    Gated Class-Attention with Cascaded Feature Drift Compensation for Exemplar-free Continual Learning of Vision Transformers
    Marco Cotogni, Fei Yang, Claudio Cusano, Andrew D Bagdanov, and Joost van de Weijer
    arXiv preprint arXiv:2211.12292, 2022
    arXiv
  2. eXIE
    Explaining Image Enhancement Black-Box Methods through a Path Planning Based Algorithm
    Marco Cotogni, and Claudio Cusano
    arXiv preprint arXiv:2207.07092, 2022
    arXiv
  3. Equivariant
    Offset equivariant networks and their applications
    Marco Cotogni, and Claudio Cusano
    Neurocomputing, 2022
    arXiv Official Website

2021

  1. Asymmetry
    Asymmetry at disease onset is not a predictor of Parkinson’s disease progression
    Marco Cotogni, Lucia Sacchi, Aleksander Sadikov, and Dejan Georgiev
    Journal of Parkinson’s Disease, 2021
    Official Website
  2. Recursive
    Recursive recognition of offline handwritten mathematical expressions
    Marco Cotogni, Claudio Cusano, and Antonino Nocera
    In 2020 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2021
    Official Website
  3. Detection
    Detection of Parkinson’s Disease Early Progressors Using Routine Clinical Predictors
    Marco Cotogni, Lucia Sacchi, Dejan Georgiev, and Aleksander Sadikov
    In Artificial Intelligence in Medicine: 19th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, AIME 2021, Virtual Event, June 15–18, 2021, Proceedings, 2021
    Official Website
